title: Swirl Dance
excerpt: This ai art is signed by Art Supreme. It is made on canvas and it comes with the original Certificate of Authenticity.
content: This work is an illusionistic, sectional & visceral exploration of poses which is reminiscent of narratives of identity, mortality, loss and love. rn The work explores the boundaries between the past and present by using allegory as a form of live-action or real-time role-play. rn
